overall.description: First-person perspective walking through a dark forest trail at night, illuminated by a handheld torch. The footage appears to be from a high-fidelity video game, featuring realistic grass, rocky terrain, and atmospheric lighting. The character traverses from a grassy path to a rocky section with wooden planks.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along a narrow dirt path surrounded by tall grass and trees in darkness

entered.detail: tall wild grass lining both sides of the trail, illuminated by ambient light
narrow dirt trail winding through the grassy field
dense line of deciduous trees forming the left boundary of the trail
dense line of deciduous trees forming the right boundary of the trail
dark clear night sky visible through the tree canopy

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person walk through a narrow forest trail at night. Tall grass flanks the dirt path on both sides while tree lines mark the boundaries. The scene is dark with minimal ambient light, creating an atmospheric, isolated environment with no other characters or vehicles present.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky trail with wooden plank crossing

events.description: ground surface transitions from dirt and grass to rocky terrain with stone outcrops
character raises a wooden torch, casting dynamic warm light on the surroundings

agents.ego_description: navigating the rocky trail while briefly holding and moving a torch to illuminate the path ahead

entered.detail: large rock formations and boulders lining the left side of the trail
rocky ground surface with scattered stones and gravel
wooden planks laid across a section of the rocky path to form a small bridge

segments.scene_description: The trail transitions to rocky terrain with large stone outcrops replacing the grassy fields. A wooden plank bridge appears in the path. Around 40 seconds, the character raises a torch, casting warm flickering light on the rocks before continuing through the rugged landscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a dark forest trail that transforms from a soft grassy path into a rugged, rocky landscape. It begins by moving along a narrow dirt track flanked by tall grass and dense tree lines under a heavy, isolated darkness. As the camera progresses, the grassy fields give way to large stone outcrops and a wooden plank bridge that cuts across the path. The scene then shifts in mood as a handheld torch is raised, casting a warm, flickering glow across the jagged terrain before the camera continues forward through the rugged environment.
